- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	React frontend app for the Klinika backend, using Vite as the project scaffold.

- [x] Scaffold the Project

- [x] Customize the Project

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed and `npm run build` completed successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Added VS Code tasks for install, build, and dev server startup using `npm.cmd`.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Started the Vite dev server and opened the app at `http://localhost:5173`.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and this file are both present and updated for the current project state.
